issues.detail: Instructions are primarily code examples without explicit textual guidance, making it unclear how to apply the skill.
Skill does not address error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy paths.
File contains extensive comments and explanations, adding unnecessary verbosity.
Skill is vendor-locked to Modular's Mojo language, limiting compatibility with other AI agents.
Installation script uses curl piped to sh without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: SIMD ReLU activation in Mojo
scenarios.rationale: Baseline answers with NumPy/C scalar code and never references vectorize, simdwidthof, or DTypePointer SIMD load/store; treatment implements the documented @parameter+vectorize pattern end to end.

scenarios.name: Parallel grayscale conversion across CPU cores
scenarios.rationale: Baseline falls back to multiprocessing/NumPy and omits parallelize plus the cast[DType.*]() conversions; treatment uses parallelize[process_row](height) with the BT.601 luminance formula exactly as documented.
